binance_1m_rows_note: 0 rows captured live; the W1.1 CcxtCandleFeed is fully tested with a mocked ccxt client (5 tests) but real Binance WS capture is deferred (no network in CI; documented in reports/w1_1_network_unavailable.md with the exact follow-up PR recipe). Per W0 BTC-only fallback, real-data capture is a separate 1-PR change.
polygon_1h_rows_note: 0 rows captured; W1.2 US-equity WebSocket is a typed STUB (USEquityWebSocketFeed with is_implemented: Literal[False]) per the W0 BTC-only fallback. Real Polygon/Tiingo implementation is a 1-PR change when user provides an API key; documented in reports/w1_2_stub_rationale.md.
is_calibrated_note: Placeholder per plan §W1.3. W2 will calibrate eta from 1mo ccxt public trades; W3-4 task 3.7 checks for > 2x drift and re-runs if so.

w1_stories_status.W1.5: passes (write_partitioned + 6 tests, Hive-style layout for DuckDB pushdown)

w1_pyright.warnings: informational only (pytest.approx, tmp_path, pyarrow internal types); all demoted per pyrightconfig.json

w2_stabilization_checkpoint.lock_for_w3_4_modifications: W3-4 will modify Trainer (meta-learner wiring), CostModel impact_model field, and LabelKind Literal (MetaLabel). W1.gate's green status is the lock; W2 must run before W3-4 to catch any drift.

w1_to_w2_handoff: W1.1 CcxtCandleFeed + W1.5 write_partitioned together enable W2's cost calibration from 1mo ccxt public trades. W1.3 AlmgrenChrissModel is the placeholder; W2 calibrates eta and updates artifacts/w1_state.json. W1.4 KaironSettings has the env vars W2's calibration script reads.
